title: Daily Fortune
description: A short, randomized daily fortune reading for a work-break moment.

title: Tarot Pick
description: Pull one card from a full 78-card deck across 10 workplace-life categories (job changes, salary, your boss, and more). In-game content is entirely in Korean (a deliberate one-off exception, like Cat Care).

title: Lucky Numbers
description: A for-fun random number generator. Not affiliated with any official lottery, and makes no odds-related claims.
